name: mcp-paradigm
description: MCP server for the Paradigm trading platform — DRFQv2 RFQs, OBv1 order books, FSPD future spreads, plus identity, positions, and leaderboards.
long_description: Wraps the Paradigm REST surfaces and exposes typed MCP tools across three active products: DRFQv2 (bilateral request-for-quote), OBv1 (Unified Markets order books — long-lived multi-counterparty auctions with maker quotes and taker fills), and FSPD (Future Spread Direct — orderbook for future spreads with limit/market orders, post-only/IOC, replace, cancel-all). Also covers firm-level identity credentials, positions, and the cross-firm trade-volume and liquidity leaderboards. Authenticated requests are HMAC-signed via a pluggable Signer (env-key for local; Vault Transit / AWS KMS planned). Order placement, quoting, market creation, and MMP reset are annotated destructive so MCP clients can prompt for approval.

tools.name: paradigm_echo
tools.description: Round-trip the Paradigm echo endpoint — first call to verify access key, signing key, and base URL.

tools.name: paradigm_desk_overview
tools.description: One-shot desk health snapshot: positions, identity credentials, MMP status across DRFQv2/OBv1/FSPD, plus per-product platform/system state.

tools.name: paradigm_kill_switch
tools.description: Cancel ALL active DRFQv2 orders, OBv1 quotes, and FSPD orders in one call. Destructive.

tools.name: paradigm_drfqv2_rfqs
tools.description: List DRFQv2 RFQs. For full state (RFQ + BBO + order book) use paradigm_drfqv2_rfq_snapshot.

tools.name: paradigm_drfqv2_rfq_snapshot
tools.description: Full state of a DRFQv2 RFQ in one call: RFQ + BBO + order book.

tools.name: paradigm_drfqv2_create_rfq
tools.description: Create a new DRFQv2 RFQ to chosen counterparties.

tools.name: paradigm_drfqv2_orders
tools.description: List DRFQv2 orders, or fetch one by order_id.

tools.name: paradigm_drfqv2_post_order
tools.description: Post a new DRFQv2 order, or amend if order_id set. Destructive.

tools.name: paradigm_drfqv2_cancel
tools.description: Cancel a DRFQv2 RFQ, single order, or batch by filter via target='rfq'|'order'|'orders'.

tools.name: paradigm_drfqv2_trades
tools.description: DRFQv2 trades — list, single by id, or public tape (mode='tape').

tools.name: paradigm_drfqv2_instruments
tools.description: List DRFQv2 instruments, or fetch one by instrument_id.

tools.name: paradigm_drfqv2_counterparties
tools.description: List desks the firm can RFQ on DRFQv2.

tools.name: paradigm_drfqv2_price_legs
tools.description: DRFQv2 leg pricing — split strategy bid/ask across legs.

tools.name: paradigm_drfqv2_mmp
tools.description: DRFQv2 MMP — action='status' to read, 'reset' to re-arm.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_obs
tools.description: List active OBv1 order book markets. For full state use paradigm_obv1_market_snapshot.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_market_snapshot
tools.description: Full state of an OBv1 market: market + BBO + quotes book.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_create_ob
tools.description: Open a new OBv1 order book market (public, multi-counterparty).

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_quotes
tools.description: List the desk's OBv1 quotes, or fetch one by quote_id.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_post_quote
tools.description: Post a maker quote on an OBv1 market, or replace if quote_id set. Destructive.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_cancel
tools.description: Cancel a single OBv1 quote, or batch by filter.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_orders
tools.description: List OBv1 fill orders (taker fills against quotes), or fetch one by id.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_trades
tools.description: OBv1 trades — mode='trades' visible, 'blotter' desk-only, 'tape' public anonymized.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_instruments
tools.description: List OBv1 instruments, or fetch one by (venue, instrument_name).

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_price_legs
tools.description: OBv1 leg pricing.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_mmp
tools.description: OBv1 MMP — action='status' or 'reset'.

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_instruments
tools.description: List FSPD instruments. Filters: venue, kind, margin_type, state, clearing/settlement currency.

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_strategies
tools.description: List FSPD strategies, or fetch one by strategy_id (returns legs).

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_orderbook
tools.description: FSPD orderbook — full asks/bids depth by default, BBO summary if summary=True.

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_orders
tools.description: List FSPD orders, or fetch one by order_id.

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_post_order
tools.description: Post a new FSPD order, or replace if order_id set. Destructive.

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_cancel
tools.description: Cancel a single FSPD order, or all orders (optional label filter).

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_trades
tools.description: List FSPD trades, or fetch one by trade_id.

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_venues
tools.description: Status of all FSPD venues, or a single venue.

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_system
tools.description: FSPD operational state + server time, combined.

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_mmp
tools.description: FSPD MMP — action='status' or 'reset'.

tools.name: paradigm_identity_credentials
tools.description: Active venue API credentials registered for the desk.

tools.name: paradigm_positions
tools.description: Desk positions across venues (cached snapshot).

tools.name: paradigm_positions_refresh
tools.description: Trigger an async refresh of the positions cache. Fire-and-forget — poll paradigm_positions to read the updated snapshot.

tools.name: paradigm_leaderboard
tools.description: Cross-firm leaderboard for trade_volume, liquidity_fills, or liquidity_responses (metric param).

tools.name: paradigm_leaderboard_preferences
tools.description: Set the firm's leaderboard anonymity preference.

paradigm_access_key.title: Paradigm Access Key
paradigm_access_key.description: Bearer access key issued by Paradigm. Required for all authenticated tools.

paradigm_signing_key.title: Paradigm Signing Key
paradigm_signing_key.description: Base64-encoded HMAC signing key issued by Paradigm. Used to sign every outbound request.

paradigm_account.title: Account (multi-desk)
paradigm_account.description: Optional account name for multi-desk firms — sent as the Paradigm-Account header.

paradigm_fspd_base_url.title: FSPD Base URL Override
paradigm_fspd_base_url.description: Optional override for the FSPD API base URL. Defaults to api.fspd.paradigm.co (prod) or api.fspd.test.paradigm.co (testnet).
